title: rosa × collina var. boreykiana
intro: Rosa × collina var. boreykiana, also known as the boreykiana rose, is a type of shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Rosa × collina var. boreykiana is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
